title: Mardi Gras
writer: Winston Miller, Hal Kanter, Curtis Harrington
actors: Pat Boone, Christine Carère, Tommy Sands
plot: A military school cadet Boone wins a date with a French movie goddess (Carère) who happens to be the queen of the "Mardi Gras" parade. They fall in love, but Carère's movie studio wants to capitalize on this newly found love for p...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 2 nominations total
